creator: freebsd-bugzilla@thismonkey.com
text:
Hi,
the ntopng-geoipupdate.sh installs the GeoIP data files into the wrong path.
The default Ntopng installation expects to find the files in /usr/local/share/ntopng/httpdocs/geoip while the script installs them into usr/local/share/ntopng/.
Thanks,
Scott
